---
title: "About Me"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

I'm a second year resident at Vanderbilt University Medical Center.

I'm in the Harrison Society for medical research with a focus on rheumatology and auto-immunity.

For fun, I like to spend time with my partner (@maithripriya) and go jogging.
